# RivalEdge.ai
AI-powered competitive intelligence for businesses. Monitor competitors, track market changes, and get actionable insights.

## Product
- RivalEdge.ai monitors your competitors 24/7 using AI
- Tracks pricing changes, feature updates, marketing moves, hiring signals, news, and reviews
- Weekly AI-generated competitive intelligence reports delivered to your inbox
- Starting at $49/month — 6x cheaper than enterprise CI tools that cost $30,000+/year
- Track up to 5 competitors on the $49 Solo plan; Pro plan available for unlimited tracking

## Key Features
- AI competitor monitoring: Track competitors automatically with AI-powered signal detection
- Weekly CI reports: AI-generated competitive intelligence delivered to your inbox
- Multi-signal tracking: Pricing changes, feature updates, marketing moves, hiring signals, news, and reviews
- Real-time alerts for critical competitor moves
- No contracts, cancel anytime
- Free trial available

## Pricing
- Solo: $49/month (track up to 5 competitors)
- Pro: Custom pricing (unlimited competitors, priority support)
- Free trial available on all plans

## Comparison
- vs rivaledge.tech ($289/month): Same core CI features at 1/6th the price
- vs enterprise tools ($30,000/year): Accessible competitive intelligence for SMBs and startups
- vs manual competitor tracking: Automated 24/7 monitoring replaces hours of manual research

## Use Cases
- SMBs and startups needing affordable competitor intelligence
- Marketing teams tracking competitor campaigns and positioning
- Sales teams monitoring competitive landscape for deal intelligence
- Product teams tracking competitor feature releases
- Founders and executives needing weekly competitive landscape summaries
